items.en: The balance of the ecosystem is being disrupted.
Greenhouse gases warm the atmosphere.
Preserving biodiversity is an important task.

items.kk: Қалдықтарды қайта өңдеу қоршаған ортаны қорғайды.
items.en: Recycling waste protects the environment.

items.kk: Орман кесу климатқа теріс әсер етеді.
items.en: Deforestation has a negative effect on the climate.
Pollution levels are rising in cities.
It is necessary to ensure sustainable development.
Monitoring water quality is important.
Consumption with a small ecological footprint is recommended.

items.kk: Табиғи ресурстарды үнемдеу болашақ үшін маңызды.
items.en: Conserving natural resources is important for the future.
The startup's founders are looking for an investor.

items.kk: Бизнес-жоспар нақты және сенімді болуы керек.
items.en: The business plan must be clear and convincing.
Venture capital funds new companies.
Market research is done first.

items.kk: Прототип клиенттердің пікірін білу үшін жасалды.
items.en: A prototype was made to learn customers' opinions.

items.kk: Компания алғашқы табысын алты айда тапты.
items.en: The company earned its first profit in six months.
The innovative idea attracted investors.
Entrepreneurs must take risks.
Building a team is a key factor of success.
A startup must stand out from competitors.
The therapist established a trusting relationship with the client.
Anxiety disorder is common.
Psychotherapy sessions take place weekly.
Early detection of depression symptoms is important.
Meditation helps reduce stress.
Recognizing one's emotions is an important skill.
A support group brings relief to people.

items.kk: Психикалық денсаулық туралы стигманы жою керек.
items.en: The stigma around mental health needs to be eliminated.
Sleep disorders affect mood.
Self-care maintains emotional balance.
